final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit Serial-In Serial-Out (SISO) shift register with a clock and reset input. The shift register should accept serial input data on a 'data_in' line and shift the bits through the register on each clock cycle. The output should be a 4-bit parallel output 'data_out' that represents the contents of the shift register after each shift operation. Upon reset, the shift register is initialized to all ones.
module SISO_Shift_Register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            data_out <= 4'b0000; // Reset the register
        end else begin
            data_out <= {data_out[2:0], data_in}; // Shift left and input new data
        end
    end
endmodule
